incorrects.description: Student placed at least one bar incorrectly on first attempt
Student did not correctly place all four bars on first attempt

steps.text: Check the data table. Some values land on the lines, some between.
Not quite. Check the data table values and where each bar should end.

incorrects.description: Student placed at least one bar incorrectly on second attempt
Student did not correctly place all four bars on second attempt

params.description: Ghost gridlines at 5s highlight to show intervals.
Markers and Paintbrushes highlight on the axis, showing they should align with lines at 30 and 20.

params.text: Look at the gridlines. The lines are at 10, 20, 30. Between the lines are 5, 15, 25. Match each bar to its value.
Markers is 30, right at a line. Paintbrushes is 20, also at a line. Crayons is 45, halfway between 40 and 50. Glue Sticks is 55, halfway between 50 and 60. Where does each bar end?

steps.description: Student placed at least one bar incorrectly three or more times. System models the answer.
Student did not correctly place all four bars. System models the answer.

params.description: System sets all four bars: Markers=30, Crayons=45, Paintbrushes=20, Glue Sticks=55.
System sets all four bars: Markers at 30, Crayons at 45, Paintbrushes at 20, Glue Sticks at 55.

params.text: Let me show you. Markers is 30, right on the line. Crayons is 45, halfway between 40 and 50. Paintbrushes is 20, on the line. Glue Sticks is 55, halfway between 50 and 60. The scale of 10 means the lines are at 10, 20, 30. Values ending in 5 go between the lines.

Let me show you. Markers is 30, right at the 30 line. Crayons is 45, halfway between 40 and 50. Paintbrushes is 20, at the 20 line. Glue Sticks is 55, halfway between 50 and 60. Some bars end at the lines. Some end between the lines. The correct graph shows all four values from the data table.
